name: getHistory
description:
ALWAYS USE THIS TOOL to retrieve historical chat records and past events when a timeframe is known. Fetches directly from the database — never infer historical data from conversation context. If a previous call returned no data, try different start/end parameters or a broader range.
requirements:
- for targeted retrieval: a known timeframe (start/end timestamps); if unknown, use a timeline overview tool first to identify relevant periods

start.description: REQUIRED: start timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD, DD.MM.YYYY, or ISO 8601). If date-only, time defaults to 00:00:00.

end.description: OPTIONAL: end timestamp. If omitted, defaults to 23:59:59 of the start date. If date-only, end is exclusive at next day 00:00:00.

start_ctx_id.description: OPTIONAL: continue pagination from after this ctx_id (applies across all channels).

channel_id.description: OPTIONAL: override the channel to query. Use the caller's channel ID when running as a subagent.

channel_ids.description: OPTIONAL: additional channel IDs to include in the query (merged with channel_id).

prompt.description: OPTIONAL: additional instructions to steer the AI summary (e.g. 'focus on combat events').
